objective: Discover repeatable post-cost intraday alpha by separating move-size hazard from direction and by testing incompatible liquidity-run and liquidity-sweep mechanisms on checksum-verified official Binance state panels.

data_contract.entry_clock: next five-minute open after signal availability
data_contract.depth: last snapshot no later than decision close
data_contract.metrics: one additional completed five-minute bar delay
data_contract.aggregate_trade_policy: exclude first and last aggregate row per bar; use interior rows only for size/concentration diagnostics

VACUUM_CONTINUATION.mechanism: A directional move accompanied by aligned aggressive flow and a contraction of near depth is a liquidity run rather than a sweep.
VACUUM_CONTINUATION.direction: sign of completed-bar return and aggressive flow

ABSORPTION_REVERSAL.mechanism: Extreme aggressive flow with low price impact and depth opposing the flow signals absorption and a sweep rather than a run.

REPLENISHMENT_CONTINUATION.mechanism: After a vacuum, rapid same-side depth replenishment and retained flow alignment permits continuation after a shallow retracement.

REPLENISHMENT_REVERSAL.mechanism: After a vacuum, opposing depth replenishment and a delta flip trap the initiating flow and reverse the move.

CROWDING_UNWIND.mechanism: OI expansion and positioning crowding followed by absorption or flow reversal creates forced unwind pressure.

BREAKER_FIRST_RETEST.mechanism: A previously valid order-block region that closes through its invalidation and breaks structure becomes a trapped-position breaker; only the first causal retest is eligible.

TOUCH_DECAY_FILTER.mechanism: Repeated visits consume resting liquidity; the same zone is not assumed equally strong after multiple touches.
TOUCH_DECAY_FILTER.use: filter or interaction term only, never a standalone direction signal

model_contract.hazard_label: whether the future path over 6, 12 or 24 completed bars contains a move large enough to exceed the fixed stressed round-trip cost and a volatility-scaled safety margin; labels are training-only
model_contract.direction_label: sign of next-open to fixed-horizon return; labels are training-only
model_contract.training: monthly expanding walk-forward; every training label exit_time must be strictly before the test month begins
model_contract.probability_thresholds: 0.80 and 0.90 train-only quantiles; one fitted model must serve both thresholds
model_contract.purge: maximum label horizon plus one entry bar

execution.exit: protective stop or fixed preregistered alpha horizon; stop has priority on an ambiguous bar
execution.funding: actual official settlements on quantity held before settlement

development_gate.diversity: preserve at least one representative per passing independent arm before filling the cap

selection_and_confirmation.selection: Only frozen development representatives may access 2024; no grid rerun.
selection_and_confirmation.confirmation: Only one frozen 2024 primary may access 2025.
selection_and_confirmation.target_gate: After all settings are fixed, base-cost geometric mean daily return must be >=0.01 and all stability gates must pass.
selection_and_confirmation.2026: Never opened until the complete pre-live candidate, code, costs and risk settings are immutable.

youtube_and_subtitles: order block formed while consuming liquidity
idea_sources.translation_policy: Ideas are treated only as hypotheses. Their claimed performance is not evidence and no discretionary narrative is used in the algorithm.
